data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interactive elements are large and easy to click upon to reduce the cognitive load and time to interact.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified choices to speed up decision making and enhance user experience.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist design, straightforward navigation, content preview feature

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: The information is grouped into categories to improve user understanding and memory retention.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Adapts familiar design patterns users are accustomed to, reducing user friction.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Employs a visually appealing design that also enhances perceived usability.
